channel.title: Scada on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Scada on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted SCADA Systems: FUXA vs SCADA-LTS vs RapidScada — Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Industrial automation and real-time process monitoring are no longer the exclusive domain of enterprises with six-figure software budgets. Open-source SCADA (Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition) systems have matured to the point where small manufacturers, facility operators, research labs, and homelab enthusiasts can deploy professional-grade monitoring and control platforms on their own hardware.
